regional_cost_note: Kitchen renovations in Christchurch typically range from $16,000–$28,000 for a budget refresh up to $33,000–$60,000 for a mid-range full reno, and $65,000–$130,000+ for premium work. Canterbury rates are near the national average; post-earthquake rebuild experience is common across local trades. Get fixed-price quotes with a detailed scope — variations are the biggest source of cost blowouts.
